description_long: This is a thick, rectangular hardcover book with a bright yellow cover. The front cover features a technical illustration of a surveyor's tripod and measuring equipment, rendered in black line art. The book's edges are white, and the spine is also yellow with bold black text. The book appears to be well-bound, with a slight curve to the spine and a visible publisher logo on the lower right corner of the front cover. The cover is glossy, and the book is substantial in size, suggesting it is a comprehensive reference or textbook.
description: A thick, yellow hardcover book with a technical illustration of surveying equipment on the front cover and bold black text on the spine.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the illustration of surveying equipment and the title, with the book's thickness and a small publisher logo in the lower right corner.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the white page edges and the yellow cover wrapping around the spine.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the back and side, showing the plain yellow back cover and the thickness of the pages.
description_view_3: The spine is clearly visible with bold black text, and the front cover illustration is partially visible along with the book's thickness.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover is a technical drawing of a surveyor's tripod and measuring instrument, rendered in black line art. The style is precise and schematic, emphasizing the mechanical details of the equipment. The background is a solid yellow color, making the illustration stand out.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is yellow with bold black text running horizontally, featuring the book's title and author names. There are no decorative patterns, but the design is clear and professional.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small red and white logo is visible in the lower right corner of the front cover, featuring a stylized 'McGraw-Hill' design.
